---
title: "Conflict and Cooperation"
short-title: "Conflict & Cooperation"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Repeated cooperation in real data, using peer-reviewed empirical studies."
keywords: ["cooperation", "conflict", "empirical", "repeated games"]
---

# Conflict and Cooperation {#sec-conflict-cooperation}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
